title: Greek Salad
description: A classic Greek salad with cucumber, cherry tomatoes, red onion, Kalamata olives, and feta in a simple oregano and red wine vinegar dressing.

instructions.text: Whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, oregano, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Combine cucumber, cherry tomatoes, red onion, olives, and feta in a large bowl.
Pour dressing over the salad and toss gently to combine. Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to an hour before serving.

notes:
Unlike green salads, this holds up well after dressing -- the vegetables don't wilt. Can be made up to an hour ahead.

For a more traditional presentation, cut cucumber into thick half-moons and leave feta in larger chunks rather than crumbling.
